results.team_chat_note:
TLDR: Strong apparent fit on written evidence, with several JD/rubric signals present.
Estimated match: 92%

- Evidence: relevant UI/UX material found in attachments.
- Strengths: has some business/revenue or conversion-related signal; shows matching/recommendation/networking-related signal; shows subscription/paywall/premium-conversion signal.
- Gaps / follow-up: no major gap identified from keyword scan; human review still needed.
